surface: get_trade_call / get_trade_signal response — closest_tradeable (object) + also_see (array of cells)
change_class: VALUE-ONLY (Mr.1-signed-off 2026-06-05). Keys byte-identical; the only diff is the `exchange` VALUE.

field_contract.exchange: ExchangeId — the venue the grid ACTUALLY scores on (GRID_SCORING_EXCHANGE)

exchange_value.reason: Grid scores via the get_trade_call DEFAULT exchange = BINANCE (root-caused OPS-BINANCE-RATELIMITER-W1). The prior 'HL' label was a false provenance statement. Now stamped from GRID_SCORING_EXCHANGE = the same symbol passed to the scorer, so label == scoring venue by construction.

diff_gate: keys(after) === keys(before) (exactly the 4 allowed_keys); ONLY closest_tradeable.exchange + also_see[].exchange values change 'HL' -> 'BINANCE'. Any key add/remove or forbidden-key appearance = FAIL.
consumers: Telegram bot 'See Also' surface (same-TF + same-exchange suggestion) — BOT-ALERT-IMAGE-W1
verify view (signal-row exchange is SEPARATE — not this surface)
drift_check_command: npx vitest run tests/get-trade-signal-envelope.test.ts tests/integration/trade-call-also-see.test.ts tests/unit/grid-scoring-exchange.test.ts && curl -s <mcp>/get_trade_call?coin=BTC | jq '.closest_tradeable.exchange, (.also_see[].exchange)'
